shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"react-datepicker selectsRange multi-month filler day in-selecting-range preview highlight day rendering\" --json --top-k 5
sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md
rg -n \"in-selecting-range|selectingRange|selectsRange|month\" src/day.tsx src/month.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx | head -160"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/day.tsx
sed -n '270,480p' src/day.tsx
sed -n '280,410p' src/month.tsx
sed -n '470,520p' src/month.tsx
sed -n '520,620p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx
sed -n '1480,1740p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short
sed -n '180,290p' src/day.tsx
sed -n '1,90p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx
sed -n '1,130p' src/month.tsx
sed -n '1,180p' src/week.tsx
cat package.json | sed -n '1,140p'"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function newDate|const newDate|newDate =|jest.useFakeTimers|setSystemTime\" src/date_utils.ts src/test | head -80
rg -n \"isAfterMonth|isBeforeMonth|outside-month\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx | head -60
sed -n '400,470p' src/day.tsx
sed -n '450,510p' src/day.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '95,125p' src/date_utils.ts
sed -n '1150,1205p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx
rg -n \"renderDay\\(["'^'"\\n]*\\{[\\s\\S]*selectsRange|selectsRange: true\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx | head -40"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- src/day.tsx && git status --short && git diff --check'
